name: Synchro Panic
desc: Activate only if a face-up Synchro Monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect, by targeting 1 of them; Special Summon 1 Tuner and 1 or more non-Tuners from your GY, whose total Levels equal the targeted monster's, and if you do, they cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects this turn. Neither player can Synchro Summon. Destroy this card during your 3rd Standby Phase after activation.
eff: Activate only if a face-up Synchro Monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect, by targeting 1 of them; Special Summon 1 Tuner and 1 or more non-Tuners from your GY, whose total Levels equal the targeted monster's, and if you do, they cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects this turn. Neither player can Synchro Summon. Destroy this card during your 3rd Standby Phase after activation.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
